calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. The deemed-admitted order conclusively establishes plaintiff's entitlement to judgment. Plaintiff shall provide a proposed judgment with proof of service on the defendant.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to Dept. 301 a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Wells Fargo, N.A.'s motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in its Requests for Admission, Set One, to defendant Badri Singh is granted. Singh failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (CCP 2033.280(a).) The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs is deemed admitted by Singh. (CCP 2033.280(b), (c).)

Wells Fargo does not seek sanctions. But CCP 2033.280(c) provides: "It is mandatory that the court impose a monetary sanction under Chapter 7 (commencing with Section 2023.010) on the party or attorney, or both, whose failure to serve a timely response to requests for admission necessitated this motion." The court awards sanctions of $50 payable by Singh to Wells Fargo within 30 days of entry of this order. Wells Fargo shall provide notice of this order.

A proposed order is submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Set For Trial On Apr-13-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
